content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; frame-src https://www.google.com https://maps.google.com; connect-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'
